parameters.jsCode:
const parsed = JSON.parse($input.first().json.result);
return [{ json: parsed }];

={{ JSON.stringify({
  videoUrl:          $json.videoUrl,

}) }}

parameters.message:
=🎬 **Your video is ready!**

👉 Please review it carefully and approve it.
✅ Once approved, it will be uploaded to **YouTube** and **Reels**.

🔗 Video Link: {{ $('Video Ready Webhook').item.json.body.video_url }}
